fields.name: 3am Quesadilla
fields.description: Cheese, tortilla, microwave. Stop overthinking it.

fields.name: Honey Toast Spaghetti
fields.description: Don't ask. Don't taste. Just trust.

fields.name: Peanut Butter Spoon
fields.description: The peanut butter is the meal. The spoon is the cutlery.

fields.name: Bunny Chow
fields.description: Hollow out a loaf, fill it with the most. SA classic. Demolition guaranteed.

fields.name: Maltabella + Banana
fields.description: Hot maize porridge with banana mashed in. Childhood reactivated.

fields.name: Ice Cream Sandwich (Literal)
fields.description: Two slices of bread, scoop of ice cream. Yes.

fields.name: Couch Glue
fields.description: Heavy indica. The kind that makes the couch feel like it's hugging you back. Side effects: forgetting why you stood up.

fields.name: 3am Philosopher
fields.tagline: Indica that turns you into Socrates
fields.description: Warning: may result in eating cereal with a fork, peanut butter straight from the jar, and making enemies with your fridge.

fields.name: Goblin Mode
fields.description: Warning: may result in eating cereal with a fork, peanut butter straight from the jar, and making enemies with your fridge.

fields.name: Clapback Pack
fields.tagline: For when you smoke and remember everything.
fields.description: Suddenly you got fake arguments in the shower and perfect comebacks to beef from 2019.

fields.name: BSM Reserve
fields.description: Premium purple strain inspired by brother BSM — incredible quality, but somehow still “coming soon” since the Stone Age.

fields.name: Delayed Regret
fields.description: For the impatient legends who take another one and then spend the next hour bargaining with God.

fields.name: Time Traveler Gummies
fields.description: One gummy in and suddenly you’ve lived three lifetimes waiting for Uber Eats.

fields.name: Silent Assassin
fields.description: Tiny edible, huge betrayal. Looks harmless until you forget how legs work.

fields.name: Mystery Box
fields.description: A sealed box. We don't know what's in it. The guy who packed it doesn't know either. You'll find out together.
